creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel O'Connor from comment #6)
I can't apply your patch:

error: patch failed: lang/sdcc/Makefile:1
error: lang/sdcc/Makefile: patch does not apply
error: patch failed: lang/sdcc/pkg-plist:189
error: lang/sdcc/pkg-plist: patch does not apply

Did you run "git diff" on updated ports tree?
